title: Intensely Roasted Australian Banana Bake
description: A roasted, crumbly, and energizing Australian dish featuring banana, with an al-dente finish, made in a claypot, and friendly to those with egg allergies.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together the brown sugar, rolled oats, desiccated coconut, and almond meal.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the honey and lemon juice until well combined.
Add the melted unsalted butter to the honey and lemon juice mixture, whisking until smooth.
Cut the bananas into 1-inch pieces and add to the honey and butter mixture, tossing until the bananas are well coated.
Add the banana mixture to the dry ingredients and mix until just combined, being careful not to overmix.
Transfer the mixture to a claypot and cover with a lid.
Bake for 35 minutes, then remove the lid and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the bananas are tender.
Remove the claypot from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
